about.body: Clay & Loom is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.name: Handcrafted Decor
features: Pieces that make a house a home.

items.name: Custom Orders
features: Tell us your idea; we'll craft it.

items.a: Yes — local delivery and pickup slots are available.

items.a: Unused items in original packaging can be exchanged within 7 days.
